title: Assistant Store Manager - Durian Furniture - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Durian Furniture - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
We at Durian Furniture are looking for an experienced Assistant Store Manager based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Durian Furniture:
Durian Furniture is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Durian Furniture!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
